name: PowerTrust
postCreateCommand: if [ -f /etc/apt/sources.list.d/kali.sources ]; then sudo sed -i 's/^Types: deb$/Types: deb deb-src/g' /etc/apt/sources.list.d/kali.sources; elif [ -f /etc/apt/sources.list ]; then grep -q '^deb-src' /etc/apt/sources.list || echo 'deb-src http://http.kali.org/kali kali-rolling main contrib non-free non-free-firmware' | sudo tee -a /etc/apt/sources.list > /dev/null; fi && sudo apt update && sudo apt -y build-dep ncurses
